params.name: Peacock Suit
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Murikan Treasure Maps (10%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Dec 13, 1974, Elvis Presley wore this Peacock Suit and gave a great performance.

On this day, Elvis Presley wore this peacock suit with a white V-neck top as his costume because he believed that the peacock was a symbol of good luck. Back then, he spent a hefty sum to hire a fashion designer in L.A. to make this suit. He also took the cover of his album "Promised Land" in this suit.
